title: The Commander Battles Intensify
description: On pages 13–14, this part focuses on Law, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Big Mom, Kid as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mine's the same... but we're not getting anywhere like this.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You'll need to back me up and play that ace!!

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: That incision is harmless... but Kroom...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: You could use some more mag- netism!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the!? It's like I've become a magnet!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Our weapons are being drawn in!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The steel beams of the towers are being ripped out!!

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: Trafalgar, get me out of here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Don't tell me what to do.

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 29 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
